```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0

total = sum(counts.values())
expected_total = shots if shots is not None else total
assert total == expected_total

observed_states = set(counts)
assert observed_states.issubset(allowed_states), (observed_states, allowed_states)

nonzero_states = [state for state, c in counts.items() if c > 0]
assert len(nonzero_states) >= 2, nonzero_states

max_count = max(counts.values())
assert max_count < total, counts

support_mass = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in allowed_states)
assert support_mass == total, counts
```

```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0

total = sum(counts.values())
expected_total = shots if shots is not None else total
assert total == expected_total

observed_states = set(counts)
assert observed_states.issubset(allowed_states), (observed_states, allowed_states)

nonzero_allowed = [state for state in allowed_states if counts.get(state, 0) > 0]
assert len(nonzero_allowed) >= 2

max_count = max(counts.values())
assert max_count < total, "All probability mass collapsed onto a single outcome"

allowed_total = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in allowed_states)
assert allowed_total == total
```

```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total > 0, "total measured counts must be positive"

observed_states = set(counts)
assert observed_states <= allowed_states, f"unexpected basis states observed: {observed_states - allowed_states}"

nonzero_allowed = sum(1 for state in allowed_states if counts.get(state, 0) > 0)
assert nonzero_allowed >= 2, "probability mass should not collapse to a single outcome"

max_count = max(counts.values())
assert max_count < total, "all probability mass collapsed onto one outcome"

if shots:
    assert total == shots, f"total counts {total} should match shots {shots}"
```

```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total > 0, "total measured counts/probability must be positive"

observed_states = set(counts)
assert observed_states <= allowed_states, f"unexpected basis states observed: {observed_states - allowed_states}"

allowed_mass = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in allowed_states)
assert allowed_mass == total, "all probability mass should remain in the one-hot basis-state family"

max_mass = max(counts.values())
assert max_mass < 0.8 * total, "distribution should not collapse onto a single outcome"

nonzero_allowed = sum(1 for state in allowed_states if counts.get(state, 0) > 0)
assert nonzero_allowed >= 2, "at least two allowed outcomes should have nonzero mass"
```

```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total > 0, "total measured count/probability must be positive"

observed_states = set(counts)
assert observed_states <= allowed_states, f"unexpected basis states observed: {observed_states - allowed_states}"

support_mass = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in allowed_states)
assert abs(support_mass - total) <= 1e-9 * max(1, total), "probability mass leaked outside the intended family"

max_outcome = max(counts.values())
assert max_outcome < 0.9 * total, "measurement mass collapsed too strongly onto a single outcome"

nonzero_allowed = sum(1 for state in allowed_states if counts.get(state, 0) > 0)
assert nonzero_allowed >= 2, "expected the distribution to occupy multiple allowed outcomes"
```

```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0

total = sum(counts.values())
expected_total = shots if shots is not None else total
assert total == expected_total

for state, c in counts.items():
    assert state in allowed_states, f"Unexpected basis state measured: {state}"
    assert c >= 0

nonzero_states = [state for state, c in counts.items() if c > 0]
assert len(nonzero_states) >= 2, "Probability mass collapsed onto a single outcome"

max_count = max(counts.values())
assert max_count < total, "All shots landed on one outcome"
assert max_count <= 0.7 * total, f"One outcome is too dominant: {max_count}/{total}"
```

allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert nonzero_allowed >= 2, "probability mass collapsed onto fewer than two allowed outcomes"

allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"

```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"
assert all(state in allowed_states for state in counts), f"Unexpected basis states observed: {set(counts) - allowed_states}"

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total > 0, "Total measured counts/probability must be positive"

if total <= 1.000001:
    probs = list(counts.values())
    max_mass = max(probs)
    support = sum(1 for p in probs if p > 0)
    assert abs(total - 1.0) < 1e-6 or 0.99 <= total <= 1.01, f"Probabilities should sum to ~1, got {total}"
else:
    probs = [v / total for v in counts.values()]
    max_mass = max(probs)
    support = sum(1 for v in counts.values() if v > 0)

assert support >= 2, "Distribution collapsed to a single outcome"
assert max_mass < 0.8, f"Too much probability mass on one outcome: {max_mass}"
```

allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"

total = sum(counts.values())

```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, f"Total counts {total_counts} != shots {shots}"

observed_states = set(counts)
assert observed_states <= allowed_states, f"Observed states outside allowed family: {observed_states - allowed_states}"

nonzero_allowed = [state for state in allowed_states if counts.get(state, 0) > 0]
assert len(nonzero_allowed) > 1, f"Probability mass collapsed onto one outcome: {nonzero_allowed}"

max_count = max(counts.values()) if counts else 0
assert max_count < shots, f"All probability mass collapsed onto a single outcome: {counts}"
```

```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
expected_shots = shots if shots is not None else total_counts
assert total_counts == expected_shots, f"Total counts {total_counts} != shots {expected_shots}"

observed_states = set(counts.keys())
assert observed_states <= allowed_states, f"Unexpected states observed: {observed_states - allowed_states}"

nonzero_allowed = [state for state in allowed_states if counts.get(state, 0) > 0]
assert len(nonzero_allowed) >= 2, f"Distribution collapsed to too few outcomes: {nonzero_allowed}"

max_count = max(counts.values()) if counts else 0
assert max_count < total_counts, f"All probability mass collapsed onto one outcome: {counts}"
```

```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, f"Counts sum {total_counts} does not match shots {shots}"

observed_states = set(counts)
assert observed_states <= allowed_states, f"Observed states outside intended family: {observed_states - allowed_states}"

nonzero_allowed = sum(1 for state in allowed_states if counts.get(state, 0) > 0)
assert nonzero_allowed >= 2, f"Probability mass collapsed onto too few outcomes: {counts}"

max_count = max(counts.values()) if counts else 0
assert max_count < shots, f"All probability mass collapsed onto one outcome: {counts}"

assert len(observed_states) >= 2, f"Expected multiple basis states to appear, got: {counts}"
```

```python
allowed_states = {"00001", "00010", "00100", "01000", "10000"}

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0

total = sum(counts.values())
expected_total = shots if shots is not None else total
assert total == expected_total

for state, c in counts.items():
    assert state in allowed_states, f"Unexpected basis state measured: {state}"
    assert c >= 0

nonzero_states = [state for state, c in counts.items() if c > 0]
assert len(nonzero_states) >= 2, "Probability mass collapsed onto a single outcome"

max_count = max(counts.values())
assert max_count < total, "All probability mass is on one outcome"

allowed_total = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in allowed_states)
assert allowed_total == total
```
